description.from: Attacks an enemy 3 times, dealing ??? P.DMG and increasing ??? P.DMG the target takes by 25% for 10 sec. Afterward, each hit inflicts 1 stack of [Mortal Wound] that deals ??? P.DMG over 16 sec. [Mortal Wound] can be stacked up to max 5 times.
description.to: Deals 243*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+140% ATK Physical DMG to a random enemy 3 times, applies [Grievous Wound] stacks 1, and increases Physical DMG taken by 30% for 4 sec.

description.from: Increases all allies' ATK and P.Dodge by 250 for 10 sec. Afterward, Roi grants [Specter's Breath] upon self for 10 sec. For the duration of [Specter's Breath], increases own ATK Spd by 250, DMG dealt to enemies by 20%, and evades all P.DMG attacks
description.to:
For 7 sec, increases all allies’ ATK by 393*(1+0.3*Skill Level) and Physical Evasion by 300, and grants self [Breath of Death] for 7 sec.
[Breath of Death] : Attack Speed increases by 30%, damage dealt to enemies increases by 25%, and all Physical Attacks are evaded.

description.from: Moves behind an enemy and deals ??? P.DMG. Consumes stacks of [Mortal Wound] from the target adding ??? P.DMG for every 1 stack. Upon a Crit Hit recovers 2 orbs of Mana and resets Cooldown of [Hack].
description.to:
Moves behind the enemy and deals 799*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+459.4% ATK Physical DMG, consuming all [Grievous Wound] stacks on the target and dealing additional Physical DMG equal to 137.8% ATK per 1 stack consumed. On Critical Hit, applies Bleed stacks 1 and resets the cooldown of [Slaughter].
Bleed : Deals 5% ATK Physical DoT every 1 sec for 15 sec, stacking up to 20 times.

description.from: Increases Crit Chance by 300. If normal attack is landed as a Crit Hit attacks the target 6 times, dealing additional ??? P.DMG and inflicting a stack of [Mortal Wound] with a 50% chance.
description.to:
Critical Rate increases by 300.
Every 10 sec, when a Normal Attack lands as a Critical Hit, deals 96*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+54.9% ATK Physical DMG 6 times, with a 50% chance per hit to apply [Grievous Wound] stacks 1.
[Grievous Wound] : Deals 15% ATK Physical DoT every 1 sec for 15 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

light.to: The target is changed to the enemy with the highest ATK.

dark.from: Auto attack DMG is boosted by 100% for the duration.
dark.to: Normal Attack damage increases by 115% for the duration.

light.from: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, DMG dealt is increased by 100%.
light.to: Mana cost increases by 1000 and damage increases by 100%.
The chance for [Rend] to apply [Fatal Wound] stacks is changed to 100%.

description.from: [No Mercy] Dispels all negative effects from self, and recovers Mana by {0} upon Critial hit.
description.to: [Merciless] Dispels all negative effects from self, and recovers Mana by {0} upon Critical Hit.

description.from: [Curtain of Darkness] For the duration of Skill, recovers own Mana by 150 every sec and increases own DMG dealt against Bosses by {0}%.
description.to: [Curtain of Darkness] increases duration by 3 sec and boosts DMG dealt to Bosses by {0}%.

description.from: [Hack] Increases DMG by 50%. Upon a Critical Hit, increases own ATK Spd by {0} for 5 sec.
description.to: [Hack] increases DMG by {0}% and applies 1 stack of [Bleed] to the target on Crit.

dark.from: Upon a Crit Hit, ATK Spd is increased by 300 and Crit DMG is increased by 60% for 5 sec. Does not activate again during activation.
dark.to: On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by 300% and Critical Damage by 60% for 5 sec. This effect can only be triggered once every 5 sec.

description.from: Each auto attack has a {0}% chance of inflicting 1 stack of [Mortal Wound]. Each stack of [Mortal Wound] deals additional DMG equal to {1}% of ATK.
description.to: When using Normal Attacks or [Rend], has a {0}% chance to apply 1 additional stacks of [Fatal Wound] and deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power per [Fatal Wound] stack.
